name: greeting
response_templates: Hello! How can I help you with your studies or project today?

name: ask_model
examples: Are you using Gemini or Claude?
response_templates: I primarily use Gemini. If Gemini is unavailable, I fall back to Claude.

name: check_quota
examples: Why am I getting quota errors?
response_templates: Check your API dashboard for RPM/RPD limits. If multiple keys share the same Google project, quota is shared. Use separate Google Cloud projects for independent quotas.

name: set_keys
examples: How do I set keys in Streamlit?
Where do I put API keys?
response_templates:
Place your keys in .streamlit/secrets.toml:
GEMINI_KEYS = ["key1", "key2", "key3"]
CLAUDE_API_KEY = "your_claude_key"

name: explain_error
examples: I get 'All API attempts failed' when I ask
response_templates: This usually means key rotation or the SDK call is incorrect. Enable debug logging to surface the real exception. Also verify secrets.toml has valid keys and correct field names.

name: study_help
response_templates: Sure — please specify the topic and I'll give you a clear explanation. Ask 'explain in detail' for a deeper LLM-powered answer.

name: generate_quiz
examples: Generate a quiz on database normalization
response_templates: I can generate a short quiz. Tell me the topic and number of questions, e.g. 'quiz on OS, 5 questions'.

name: assignment_help
examples: Help me write assignment on data structures
response_templates: Share the assignment prompt and any constraints (word count, format). I will generate a structured draft.

name: code_help
response_templates: Paste the minimal code and the error message. I will identify the offending line and suggest fixes.

name: offline_options
examples: Can I run the model offline?
response_templates: Yes — use Ollama or a private VPS/EC2 instance. Streamlit Cloud cannot run local LLMs directly.

name: unknown
response_templates: AI service temporarily unavailable, or your question was unclear. Try rephrasing, or ask 'explain in detail' to trigger the LLM fallback.
